privileged_info_summary: The ground_truth_value of 0.42 for the 20-period AAPL-MSFT correlation is incorrect. Verification using actual data files (AAPL.Last.txt and MSFT.Last.txt, Jan 2023 - Dec 2024) shows the 20-period Pearson correlation ending Dec 31, 2024 is -0.1701, which differs from the claimed value by 0.5901. The required instruments (AAPL and MSFT) and indicator (Correlation) are correctly specified. Data contains 502 daily records per instrument spanning Jan 3, 2023 to Dec 31, 2024 with proper date alignment.
